'''shagumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaleboard|scaleboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaleboard|scaleboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shagumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shægimith|shægimith]] || [[word:shægimij|shægimij]] || [[word:shægimish|shægimish]] || [[word:shægimi|shægimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagugumuth|shagugumuth]] || [[word:shagugumuj|shagugumuj]] || [[word:shagugumush|shagugumush]] || [[word:shagugumu|shagugumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagumuth|shagumuth]] || [[word:shagumuj|shagumuj]] || [[word:shagumush|shagumush]] || [[word:shagumu|shagumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagufmuth|shagufmuth]] || [[word:shagufmuj|shagufmuj]] || [[word:shagufmush|shagufmush]] || [[word:shagufmuf|shagufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shagumuthu|shagumuthu]] || [[word:shagumuju|shagumuju]] || [[word:shagumushu|shagumushu]] || [[word:shagumuku|shagumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shagumuth|shagumuth]] || [[word:shagumuj|shagumuj]] || [[word:shagumush|shagumush]] || [[word:shagumu|shagumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shagumuthul|shagumuthul]] || [[word:shagumujul|shagumujul]] || [[word:shagumushul|shagumushul]] || [[word:shagumukul|shagumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shagumuthuthu|shagumuthuthu]] || [[word:shagumujuju|shagumujuju]] || [[word:shagumushushu|shagumushushu]] || [[word:shagumuku|shagumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shagumuthun|shagumuthun]] || [[word:shagumujun|shagumujun]] || [[word:shagumushun|shagumushun]] || [[word:shagumukun|shagumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shagumuthuoro|shagumuthuoro]] || [[word:shagumujuoro|shagumujuoro]] || [[word:shagumushuoro|shagumushuoro]] || [[word:shagumukuoro|shagumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
